title: The Leaderboard

title: Absolute Momentum (Trend Filter)

title: Volatility-Managed Portfolio
tagline: Scale equity exposure inversely to realized variance: the Moreira & Muir (2017) variance risk premium strategy — the library's first explicit risk-sizing entry.

title: Low-Volatility Anomaly (Time-Series)
tagline: Hold during calm: the Baker/Blitz low-vol anomaly adapted as a binary in/out regime selector — lottery demand and leverage constraints, applied bar by bar.

title: Statistical Pairs Mean-Reversion
tagline: The library's first multi-asset strategy: trade the co-integration residual — when two prices drift apart beyond 2 standard deviations, bet on reversion to equilibrium.
technique: backtest / pairs trading / co-integration / spread mean-reversion
